info.title: Mycroft API
info.description: API de analise de credito transparente para FIDCs brasileiros

post.description: Upload a CNAB 400 remessa file for credit analysis. Optionally include a ZIP of NFe XML files for higher accuracy NFe rule evaluation. Returns 202 with operation metadata.

engineId.description: Engine ID to use (defaults to template engine)

cedenteCnpj.description: CNPJ of the cedente (14 digits or formatted)

xmls.description: Optional ZIP file containing NFe XML files (binary). When provided, NFe rules will use XML-sourced data instead of querying the Sherlocker NFe API. The ZIP must contain at least one .xml file with standard nfeProc structure.

202.description: Operation created and queued for processing

400.description: Validation Error — field-level details in errors array

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

get.description: Returns the current status, timestamps, and counts for an operation.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Not Found — resource does not exist

get.description: Returns the hierarchical analysis result grouped by cedente > sacados > titulos. Defaults to exception-first view (filter=issues). Only available when operation status is "completed".

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter mode. "issues" (default) returns only entities with blocked/alerted status. "all" returns the complete entity tree.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Optional expansion. Reserved for future use.

dataSource.description: Data source used for this rule evaluation. For NFe rules, this is either "XML NFe" (from uploaded XML) or "Sherlocker NFe" (from API fallback).
Data source used for this rule evaluation. For NFe rules, this is either "XML NFe" (from uploaded XML) or "Sherlocker NFe" (from API fallback).
Data source used for this rule evaluation. For NFe rules, this is either "XML NFe" (from uploaded XML) or "Sherlocker NFe" (from API fallback).

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Not Found — resource does not exist

409.description: Conflict — operation not in completed state

get.description: Returns a list of all analysis engines with summary info.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

post.description: Create a custom engine with rule configurations, or clone an existing engine.

rules.description: Rule configurations (required unless cloneFrom is set)

cloneFrom.description: ID of engine to clone rules from

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Not Found — resource does not exist

get.description: Returns full engine configuration including rules.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Not Found — resource does not exist

put.description: Update name, description, or rules of a custom engine. Template engines cannot be modified.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Not Found — resource does not exist

delete.description: Delete a custom engine. Template engines and engines referenced by operations cannot be deleted.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token

404.description: Not Found — resource does not exist

409.description: Conflict — operation not in completed state

get.description: Returns this OpenAPI 3.1 specification document. No authentication required.
